intro: You'll forget about the rest of the world with the most satisfying hobby - repairing cute cat pots!
description:
Give yourself over to the ultimate relaxation! Clay&Cats will make you feel good in a way you didn't know you needed. 

Your task is simple - assemble adorable, cat-themed pottery to its full glory. Put back together pawesome vases, purrfect plates, and kittiful bowls. Don't worry about the timers and sweating to pass the challenge - take all the time getting the pieces together and enjoy the satisfying way they click into the right places. Can't get cozier than that! 

KEY FEATURES: 
- 9 categories with 14 levels of pure joy in each 
- Lo-fi music providing good vibes for the hours of playing
- Satisfying gameplay that soothes your nervous system
- Tons of adorable, furry troublemakers to admire
